en: Again I lifted my eyes and saw, and behold, a flying scroll!
zh: 我又舉目觀看，看見有一卷飛行的書卷。

en: And he said to me, "What do you see?" I answered, "I see a flying scroll. Its length is twenty cubits, and its width ten cubits."
zh: 他問我：“你看見甚麼？”我回答：“我看見一卷飛行的書卷，長十公尺，寬五公尺。”

en: Then he said to me, "This is the curse that goes out over the face of the whole land. For everyone who steals shall be cleaned out according to what is on one side, and everyone who swears falsely shall be cleaned out according to what is on the other side.
zh: 他對我說：“這是向全地發出的咒詛：凡偷盜的必照著書卷這面所寫的被清除；凡起假誓的必照著那面所記的被清除。

en: I will send it out, declares the LORD of hosts, and it shall enter the house of the thief, and the house of him who swears falsely by my name. And it shall remain in his house and consume it, both timber and stones."
zh: 萬軍之耶和華說：‘我要使這書卷出去，進入盜賊的家和指著我的名起假誓之人的家，這書卷必留在他的家中，要把他家裡的木料和石頭都毀滅 。’”

en: Then the angel who talked with me came forward and said to me, "Lift your eyes and see what this is that is going out."
zh: 那與我說話的天使又出來對我說：“你要舉目觀看，看看這出來的是甚麼？”

en: And I said, "What is it?" He said, "This is the basket that is going out." And he said, "This is their iniquity in all the land."
zh: 我說：“這是甚麼？”他回答：“這出來的是個量器。”他又說：“這是他們在全地上的罪孽 。”

en: And behold, the leaden cover was lifted, and there was a woman sitting in the basket!
zh: 看哪！量器的圓形鉛蓋被揭開，有一個婦人坐在量器裡面。

en: And he said, "This is Wickedness." And he thrust her back into the basket, and thrust down the leaden weight on its opening.
zh: 天使說：“這是罪惡。”然後他把那婦人擲回量器中，又把那鉛蓋丟在量器的口上。

en: Then I lifted my eyes and saw, and behold, two women coming forward! The wind was in their wings. They had wings like the wings of a stork, and they lifted up the basket between earth and heaven.
zh: 我又舉目觀看，看見有兩個婦人出來。她們有翅膀，好像鸛鳥的翅膀；她們的翅膀之下有風。她們把那量器抬起，抬到天地之間。

en: Then I said to the angel who talked with me, "Where are they taking the basket?"
zh: 我問那與我說話的天使：“她們要把量器帶到哪裡去呢？”

en: He said to me, "To the land of Shinar, to build a house for it. And when this is prepared, they will set the basket down there on its base."
zh: 他回答我：“要在示拿地為那量器建造房子；房子預備好了，就在那裡把它安放在它自己的地方。”
